name: velune-desktop
description: Velune Desktop App - Modern music player
author: Velune Team

scripts.electron:dev: concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:renderer" "wait-on http://localhost:5000 && npx tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && npx electron dist/main/main.js"
scripts.build: vite build && npm run build:server && npm run build:electron
scripts.build:server: npx esbuild src/server/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --target=node20 --outfile=dist/server/index.js && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('dist/server/package.json', JSON.stringify({ type: 'commonjs' }))"
scripts.build:electron: tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist/main', { recursive: true }); fs.writeFileSync('dist/main/package.json', JSON.stringify({ type: 'commonjs' }))"
